claim: Kokoro 82M is the top-ranked TTS model on HuggingFace TTS Arena despite being small, trained on <100 hours of audio
actionable: Use Kokoro 82M as your local TTS baseline; it outperforms larger models while running without GPU requirements

claim: Voice embeddings can be blended via interpolation (weighted average, linear, spherical) to create custom voices without retraining the TTS model
actionable: Load multiple voice embeddings and interpolate between them (try spherical interpolation for best results) to generate new custom voices

claim: ONNX version of Kokoro runs faster than PyTorch and is suitable for local deployment on Mac/CPU without GPU
actionable: Use the Kokoro ONNX package from GitHub instead of PyTorch for production local TTS; supports real-time generation

claim: Local TTS with Kokoro eliminates external API calls and data exposure compared to ElevenLabs or OpenAI TTS
actionable: Use local Kokoro TTS for voice apps requiring privacy; pair with local STT/ASR and LLM for fully local voice agents
